title: Can compile on clearlinux because libselinux is missing
body:
<!--
If you are reporting a new issue, make sure that we do not have any duplicates
already open. You can ensure this by searching the issue list for this
repository. If there is a duplicate, please close your issue and add a comment
to the existing issue instead.

If you suspect your issue is a bug, please edit your issue description to
include the BUG REPORT INFORMATION shown below. If you fail to provide this
information within 7 days, we cannot debug your issue and will close it. We
will, however, reopen it if you later provide the information.

---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST
-->

I can't build buildah on clearlinux because libselinux is missing, event when providing BUILDTAGS="" or BUILDTAGS="systemd".


<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
```
export GOPATH=~/Source/podman
cd $GOPATH

BUILDAH_VERSION="v1.9.2"

git clone -b $BUILDAH_VERSION --single-branch --depth 1 https://github.com/containers/buildah $GOPATH/src/github.com/containers/buildah

cd $GOPATH/src/github.com/containers/buildah
BUILDTAGS="" make BUILDTAGS="" PREFIX=/opt/podman
```

**Describe the results you received:**
```
go generate ./cmd/podman/varlink/...
go build -gcflags 'all=-trimpath=/home/admin/Source/libpod/src/github.com/containers/libpod' -asmflags 'all=-trimpath=/home/admin/Source/libpod/src/github.com/containers/libpod' -ldflags ' -X github.com/containers/libpod/libpod.gitCommit=b3f10c8be229bcc58c1673b0431285fd5fce1293-dirty -X github.com/containers/libpod/libpod.buildInfo=1563746895 -X github.com/containers/libpod/libpod.installPrefix=/usr/local -X github.com/containers/libpod/libpod.etcDir=/etc' -tags "systemd" -o bin/podman github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman
# pkg-config --cflags  -- glib-2.0 gobject-2.0 ostree-1 libselinux glib-2.0 gobject-2.0 ostree-1
Package libselinux was not found in the pkg-config search path.
Perhaps you should add the directory containing `libselinux.pc'
to the PKG_CONFIG_PATH environment variable
No package 'libselinux' found
pkg-config: exit status 1
make: *** [Makefile:143: podman] Error 2
```
**Describe the results you expected:**
buildah compiling without libselinux

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
NAME="Clear Linux OS"
VERSION=1
ID=clear-linux-os
ID_LIKE=clear-linux-os
VERSION_ID=30450
PRETTY_NAME="Clear Linux OS"
ANSI_COLOR="1;35"
HOME_URL="https://clearlinux.org"
SUPPORT_URL="https://clearlinux.org"
BUG_REPORT_URL="mailto:dev@lists.clearlinux.org"
PRIVACY_POLICY_URL="http://www.intel.com/privacy"
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux clr-build 5.1.17-363.kvm #2 SMP Thu Jul 11 14:18:08 PDT 2019 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
reason seems to be that libselinux is included into vendor/modules.txt unconditionally

comments.body: Supplying any BUILDTAGS also results in requiering selinux
Let's keep the discussion over at libpod (https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/3614).
Closing as we resolved the issue in https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/3614.
